description_long: This object consists of three large, square wooden storage crates arranged in a stacked and staggered formation. The crates are constructed from planks of wood, reinforced at the edges with a frame and visible black fasteners at the corners. On one visible side, each crate features a distinct, brightly colored symbol: a green wrench and screwdriver crossed, a red medical cross, and a yellow bullet, suggesting different contents or purposes. The wood has a natural, matte finish with visible grain patterns, giving the crates a rugged, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban or industrial environments. The tops of the crates are open, indicating they are designed for easy access and storage. The overall construction appears sturdy, capable of supporting significant weight on top.
description: A set of three large, square wooden crates with reinforced edges and colorful symbols indicating their contents. The crates have open tops and a rugged, utilitarian design suitable for urban use.
description_view_0: Two wooden crates are stacked vertically, showing plain wooden surfaces with visible grain and corner fasteners.
description_view_1: Three crates are visible, each displaying a different colored symbol (tools, medical cross, bullet) on the front, highlighting their intended contents.
description_view_2: The rear view of two stacked crates, showing plain wooden panels without any symbols or markings.
description_view_3: Three crates are arranged in a staggered stack, showing their plain wooden faces and the open tops, with no visible symbols.
